title: Bridge Essay: Wondering Awe Is the Mediator of the Link Between Experience of Nature and Psychological Wellbeing-Relevance for Public Health.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ecology/Animism** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Ecology/Animism — nature connectedness, biophilia, environmental neuroscience.
**Phase context:** Nature connectedness, biophilia, environmental neuroscience.

**Wondering Awe Is the Mediator of the Link Between Experience of Nature and Psychological Wellbeing-Relevance for Public Health.** — Int J Environ Res Public Health (2025). DOI: 10.3390/ijerph22111679. PMID: 41302626. BACKGROUND: Access to green spaces is crucial for public health. For psychological health, the ability to pause in fascination or wondering awe (as an indicator of mindful resonance with nature) appears particularly relevant. However, it remains unclear whether non-interventional experience of nature is directly related to wellbeing or requires a mediator.
